# Sprint 10.1 Long Term Impact Assessment

**Project:** urban-parking-optimization-system
**Sprint:** Sprint 10. Post Project Review
**Objective:** Conduct a post-project review to assess the long-term impact and sustainability of the Urban Parking Optimization System.

## Description
Assess the long-term impact of the system on parking search time, revenue, and CO2 emissions.

## Deliverable
Long-term impact assessment report
